explanation: Sauté, Boil, Roast, and Bake are all methods of cooking food by applying heat. 'Chop' is a method of preparing food by cutting it into pieces, typically done before cooking.

category: Destroyed Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: All are among the traditional Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Temple of Artemis, Mausoleum, Colossus, and Lighthouse were all destroyed and no longer stand, while the Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one still largely intact today.

category: Words Describing Forms of Light or Shine
explanation: Glare, Glimmer, Glisten, and Gleam all describe specific qualities or types of visible light or the act of shining. Gloom, in contrast, refers to a state of partial or total darkness, or a dim and unlit condition.
